notes: Full dine-in menu captured including happy hour, snacks, mains, and dessert. Prices were not listed on the website menu text for any dishes or drinks; mix-and-match lunch combo is $16. Bottle wine list not present; cocktail and sangria names/ingredients captured without prices. Seasonal features and select-location items noted.
